sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي بَعْضُ الْأَطْفَالِ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Neka djeca provode duge sate ispred ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Some children spend long hours in front of screens.

sentences.arabic: تَنْصَحُ الْأُمَّهَاتُ أَبْنَاءَهُنَّ بِتَقْلِيلِ وَقْتِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Majke savjetuju svoju djecu da smanje vrijeme korištenja telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Mothers advise their children to reduce phone usage time.

sentences.arabic: الْقِرَاءَةُ وَالرِّيَاضَةُ أَفْضَلُ لِلصِّحَّةِ مِنَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Čitanje i sport su bolji za zdravlje od interneta.
sentences.translationEn: Reading and sports are better for health than the internet.
